requirement_topic.en: IRAM / IEC 61851 Conductive Charging Safety Reference
requirement_topic.zh: IRAM / IEC 61851传导充电安全参考
requirement_topic.zht: IRAM / IEC 61851傳導充電安全參考

summary.en: IEC 61851-1:2017 is the international reference for EV conductive charging systems, including EV supply equipment operating characteristics, the EV-to-EVSE connection, and electrical safety requirements. In Argentina, IRAM or buyer specifications may reference IEC-based EVSE standards, but this should be treated as voluntary or project-specific unless an Argentine regulation, tender, utility condition, or electrical-installation approval expressly incorporates the requirement.
summary.zh: IEC 61851-1:2017是电动汽车传导充电系统的国际参考，覆盖供电设备运行特性、车辆与供电设备连接以及电气安全要求。在阿根廷，IRAM或买方技术规格可能引用IEC类EVSE标准，但除非阿根廷法规、招标文件、公用事业条件或电气安装批准明确纳入该要求，否则应按自愿或项目特定要求处理。
summary.zht: IEC 61851-1:2017是電動汽車傳導充電系統的國際參考，覆蓋供電設備運行特性、車輛與供電設備連接以及電氣安全要求。在阿根廷，IRAM或買方技術規格可能引用IEC類EVSE標準，但除非阿根廷法規、招標文件、公用事業條件或電氣安裝批准明確納入該要求，否則應按自願或項目特定要求處理。

standards_or_laws: IRAM-adopted or IRAM-referenced EVSE standards where specified by the project

summary.en: China EV charger files commonly cite GB/T 18487.1 for conductive charging systems. The GB/T evidence can support technical review, but it is not automatically a substitute for IEC 61851 clause mapping or IRAM-referenced documentation requested by an Argentine buyer, engineer, utility, or authority.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩资料通常引用GB/T 18487.1作为传导充电系统依据。GB/T证据可支持技术审查，但不能自动替代阿根廷买方、工程师、公用事业单位或主管机关要求的IEC 61851条款映射或IRAM参考文件。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁資料通常引用GB/T 18487.1作為傳導充電系統依據。GB/T證據可支持技術審查，但不能自動替代阿根廷買方、工程師、公用事業單位或主管機關要求的IEC 61851條款映射或IRAM參考文件。

gap.en: Prepare a clause-by-clause bridge from GB/T 18487.1 test reports, EVSE ratings, protection functions, manuals, markings, and installation instructions to the requested IEC 61851 or IRAM-referenced clauses. Confirm the edition and whether the requirement is contractual, utility-driven, code-driven, or voluntary before presenting it as mandatory.
gap.zh: 应将GB/T 18487.1测试报告、EVSE额定值、保护功能、说明书、标识和安装指南逐条映射至所要求的IEC 61851或IRAM参考条款。将其表述为强制要求前，应确认版本以及该要求属于合同、公用事业、电气规范还是自愿要求。
gap.zht: 應將GB/T 18487.1測試報告、EVSE額定值、保護功能、說明書、標識和安裝指南逐條映射至所要求的IEC 61851或IRAM參考條款。將其表述為強制要求前，應確認版本以及該要求屬於合約、公用事業、電氣規範還是自願要求。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project-specific unless incorporated by Argentine regulation, utility condition, tender, contract, or electrical-installation approval
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended national standard evidence unless made mandatory by Chinese procurement, project approval, local inspection, or another binding instrument

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487 evidence should be mapped to IEC 61851 or IRAM-referenced clauses when Argentina project documents ask for IEC-style EVSE safety evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷项目文件要求IEC类EVSE安全证据时，应将GB/T 18487证据映射至IEC 61851或IRAM参考条款。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷項目文件要求IEC類EVSE安全證據時，應將GB/T 18487證據映射至IEC 61851或IRAM參考條款。
